---
title: "About Me"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

###  My Statistics Journey

I'm Z (they/them)! I've had a pretty nonlinear math journey, beginning college as a politics major and deciding to major in math later than most. 

The switch to math was motivated by my goal of working for a Major League Baseball team in a Research & Development role. And 


## Why I love Statistics and Data Science

I love the versaility and
